audience: Nexus owner and explicitly approved GPT planning sessions
purpose: Provide a small, traceable retrieval bundle for Nexus planning without requiring manual file attachment.
boundaries: Curated declared inputs only; never dump or broadly search the repo.
Drive publication is a separate authenticated action and is not performed by snapshot generation.
GitHub Issues remain execution authority and canonical source remains game truth.
checks: Recompute every entry hash and freshness before publication.
Require an explicit owner approval for create, replace, or withdraw operations.
Record returned Drive IDs only after verified publication.
risks: A published bundle can become stale after source changes.
Uncurated retrieval can mix planning evidence with canonical game truth.
destinationPlan: Create or refresh one curated Drive folder only after owner approval; preserve stable entry IDs and record returned Drive IDs in a separately reviewed publication result.

entries.retrievalIntent: Ground GPT planning in the current spatial-game vision and vocabulary.

entries.ownerPath: Drive:Nexus Game/Project Control Context/Canonical Source Index
entries.retrievalIntent: Route retrieval to a declared canonical source document rather than broad Drive search.

entries.ownerPath: Drive:Nexus Game/Project Control Context/Issue Index Mirror
entries.authorityRole: Stale local mirror of execution packets; verify against GitHub
entries.retrievalIntent: Supply queue context while forcing live GitHub verification before execution.

entries.authorityRole: Project Control authority and handoff boundaries
entries.retrievalIntent: Keep GPT recommendations inside the approved authority and approval model.
